channel.title: 🗄️ Not A File Cabinet
channel.description: Last 10 notes on 🗄️ Not A File Cabinet

item.title: unlinked
item.description: TABLE without id out AS "Uncreated files", file.link as "Origin" FLATTEN file.outlinks as out WHERE !(out.file) AND !contains(meta(out).path, "/") ...

item.title: Welcome, this is not a file cabinet
item.description: Welcome, this is not a file cabinet Welcome internet traveller, how did you find your way here? This isn’t really a public cabinet. I don’t have much to offer you, but I’m glad you’re here.

item.title: Untitled
item.description: H1 test hello H2 h3 h4 e num indented e un ordered indented indented e e e ==highlight hello1 this is a sentence== in a longer sentence. bold italic check un check quote quote quote what is this www not inline ? int hi = 1; for(int i=1;i<=n;i++){ } return 0; Tags todotodotodo hello test ee eee remove space after headers when edit or preview mode todo Untitled1 www.obsidian.md ---------------------------------------------------------------- WOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO ---------------------------------------------------------------- column1column2itemitemitemitem Footnotes eee ↩ ↩2 .

item.title: Drawing 2025-04-07 20.52.58.excalidraw
item.description: ⚠ Switch to EXCALIDRAW VIEW in the MORE OPTIONS menu of this document. ⚠ You can decompress Drawing data with the command palette: ‘Decompress current Excalidraw file’.

item.title: git check ignored
item.description: git ls-files --others --ignored --exclude-standard git add -f path/to/folder //remove files/folder from staging git restore --staged path/to/folder/or/file git status //check ...
